indexes.name: idx_lineitem_shipdate_filtered
indexes.workload_pattern: Q1 filters lineitem on l_shipdate. This index can speed up that specific filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q1.
indexes.tradeoffs: Slight write overhead on lineitem. Index size depends on the selectivity of the WHERE clause.

indexes.name: idx_orders_custkey_orderdate
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 filters orders on o_custkey and o_orderdate. This composite index can support this filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and potentially sorting for Q3.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_orderkey_discount
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 groups by l_orderkey and calculates revenue using l_discount. This index can help with grouping and calculation.
indexes.benefits: Faster aggregation and calculation for Q3.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_mktsegment_custkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 filters customer on c_mktsegment and joins with orders on c_custkey. This index supports the filter and join.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and join for Q3.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on customer. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_orderdate_custkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q4 filters orders on o_orderdate and joins with customer on o_custkey. This index supports the filter and join.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and join for Q4.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_shipdate_discount_quantity
indexes.workload_pattern: Q5 filters lineitem on l_shipdate, l_discount, and l_quantity. This composite index can efficiently support these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q5.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_orderkey_orderpriority
indexes.workload_pattern: Q11 joins orders and lineitem on o_orderkey and filters on o_orderpriority. This index can speed up the join and filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster join and filtering for Q11.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_orderkey_commitdate_receiptdate
indexes.workload_pattern: Q11 filters lineitem on l_orderkey, l_commitdate, and l_receiptdate. This index can support these filters and the join with orders.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and join for Q11.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_custkey_phone
indexes.workload_pattern: Q22 uses a subquery on customer to filter by phone prefix and then joins with orders. This index can help with the subquery and potential joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and potential join support for Q22.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on customer. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_part_type_size_brand
indexes.workload_pattern: Q16 filters part on p_type, p_size, and p_brand. This composite index can efficiently support these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q16.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on part. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_partsupp_partkey_suppkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q8, Q10, Q16, Q19, Q20, Q21 involve joins with partsupp on ps_partkey and ps_suppkey. This composite index can accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on partsupp. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_supplier_suppkey_nationkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q19, Q20, Q21 join supplier with other tables on s_suppkey and s_nationkey. This composite index can accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on supplier. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_nation_nationkey_regionkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q20 join nation with other tables on n_nationkey and n_regionkey. This composite index can accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on nation. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_region_regionkey_name
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q4, Q7 filter region on r_name and join on r_regionkey. This index can support these filters and joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and joins for Q2, Q4, Q7.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on region. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_part_partkey_type_brand_size
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q8, Q16, Q17, Q18, Q19, Q20 involve filtering and joining on part columns like p_partkey, p_type, p_brand, p_size. This composite index can accelerate these operations.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins and filters for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on part. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_partkey_suppkey_orderkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q8, Q19, Q20, Q21 join lineitem with part, supplier, orders, partsupp on l_partkey, l_suppkey, l_orderkey. This composite index can accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_custkey_orderdate_orderstatus
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 filters orders on o_custkey and o_orderdate, and Q9 filters on o_orderdate. Q22 filters on o_orderdate and checks for existence of lineitems. This index can support these filters and joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and joins for Q3, Q9, Q22.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_custkey_nationkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3, Q4, Q7, Q9, Q12, Q13, Q18, Q22 join customer with other tables on c_custkey and c_nationkey. This composite index can accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on customer. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_orderkey_returnflag_linestatus
indexes.workload_pattern: Q1 groups by l_returnflag and l_linestatus and uses l_orderkey for joins. This index can support the grouping and joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster grouping and joins for Q1.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_orderkey_orderdate_orderpriority
indexes.workload_pattern: Q11 filters on o_orderkey and o_orderpriority. Q3 and Q6 also use o_orderkey and o_orderdate. This index can support these filters and joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and joins for Q3, Q6, Q11.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_orderkey_shipdate_discount
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 filters lineitem on l_orderkey and l_shipdate, and calculates revenue using l_discount. This index can support these operations.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering and calculation for Q3.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_part_p_partkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q2, Q8, Q16, Q17, Q18, Q19, Q20) join with the part table on p_partkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the part table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on part. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_supplier_s_suppkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q19, Q20, Q21) join with the supplier table on s_suppkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the supplier table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on supplier. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_c_custkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q3, Q4, Q7, Q9, Q12, Q13, Q18, Q22) join with the customer table on c_custkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the customer table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on customer. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_o_orderkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q3, Q6, Q11, Q12, Q13, Q17, Q18, Q22) join with the orders table on o_orderkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the orders table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_l_orderkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q1, Q3, Q4, Q5, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q9, Q11, Q13, Q14, Q17, Q18, Q19, Q20, Q21, Q22) join with the lineitem table on l_orderkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the lineitem table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_partsupp_ps_partkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q8, Q10, Q16, Q19, Q20 join with partsupp on ps_partkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the partsupp table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on partsupp. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_nation_n_nationkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Many queries (Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q20, Q21) join with the nation table on n_nationkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the nation table.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on nation. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_o_custkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3, Q4, Q7, Q9, Q12, Q13, Q18, Q22 join orders with customer on o_custkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the orders table and customer.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_l_suppkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q4, Q6, Q7, Q8, Q10, Q19, Q20, Q21 join lineitem with supplier on l_suppkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the lineitem table and supplier.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_partsupp_ps_suppkey
indexes.workload_pattern: Q2, Q8, Q10, Q16, Q19, Q20 join partsupp with supplier on ps_suppkey. This index will accelerate these joins.
indexes.benefits: Faster joins for multiple queries involving the partsupp table and supplier.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on partsupp. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_c_mktsegment
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3 filters customer on c_mktsegment. This index can speed up this filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q3.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on customer. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_part_p_type

indexes.workload_pattern: Q2 filters part on p_size. This index can speed up this filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q2.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on part. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_part_p_brand
indexes.workload_pattern: Q16, Q17, Q18 filter part on p_brand. This index can speed up these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q16, Q17, Q18.

indexes.name: idx_part_p_container
indexes.workload_pattern: Q18 filters part on p_container. This index can speed up this filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q18.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on part. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_l_returnflag
indexes.workload_pattern: Q1 groups by l_returnflag. This index can help with the grouping.
indexes.benefits: Faster grouping for Q1.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_l_linestatus
indexes.workload_pattern: Q1 groups by l_linestatus. This index can help with the grouping.
indexes.benefits: Faster grouping for Q1.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_o_orderpriority
indexes.workload_pattern: Q11 filters orders on o_orderpriority. Q22 filters on o_orderpriority. This index can speed up these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q11, Q22.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_lineitem_l_shipdate
indexes.workload_pattern: Q1, Q5, Q6, Q11, Q13, Q14, Q19, Q20 filter lineitem on l_shipdate. This index can speed up these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on lineitem. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_orders_o_orderdate
indexes.workload_pattern: Q3, Q4, Q7, Q9, Q22 filter orders on o_orderdate. This index can speed up these filters.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for multiple queries.
indexes.tradeoffs: Write overhead on orders. Increased storage.

indexes.name: idx_customer_c_phone_prefix
indexes.workload_pattern: Q22 filters customer based on the prefix of c_phone. This partial index can speed up this specific filter.
indexes.benefits: Faster filtering for Q22.
indexes.tradeoffs: Slight write overhead on customer. Index size depends on the selectivity of the WHERE clause.

global_observations: The workload consists of many TPC-H queries, which are known to be join-heavy and filter-intensive.
Many queries filter or join on date columns. While some date filters are specific, a general index on date columns might be beneficial if selectivity is high.
Composite indexes are frequently suggested due to multiple columns being used in WHERE clauses and JOIN conditions.
Simple indexes on primary key columns are generally beneficial for join performance, and many such indexes are suggested.
Partial indexes are suggested for queries with highly selective WHERE clauses on specific columns, to reduce index size and maintenance overhead.
